mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_TYPE = '4' AND PRS_AUTH = 'ST'
AND PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG A
INNER JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID WHERE B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
SELECT PRS_COUNTRY AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS VALUE FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_TYPE = '4' GROUP BY PRS_COUNTRY

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%m월') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS VALUE FROM WH_AD_LOG A
INNER JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID
WHERE A.CREATED_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
AND B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m'), DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%m월') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.MEM_ID) FROM WH_AD_LOG A
INNER JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID
WHERE A.CREATED_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}

SELECT PRS_ID, PRS_NAME, PRS_AUTH, PRS_TYPE, APP_ID, PRS_USE_YN, PRS_COUNTRY FROM WH_PRESS WHERE (PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID} OR OWNER_EMAIL = #{PRS_ID}) AND PRS_PWD = CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))) AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET PRS_USE_YN = #{TARGET_STATUS}, PRS_UPDATE_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRESS ( PRS_ID, PRS_PWD, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_TYPE, PRS_AUTH, PRS_USE_YN, APP_ID, PRS_CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{PRS_ID}, CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))), #{PRS_NAME}, #{PRS_COUNTRY}, '1', 'LC', 'Y', #{PRS_ID}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(PRS_ID, 6) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID LIKE 'star_%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRESS ( PRS_ID, PRS_PWD, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_TYPE, PRS_AUTH, PRS_USE_YN, APP_ID, PRS_CREATE_DATE, IS_STAR ) VALUES ( #{PRS_ID}, CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))), #{PRS_NAME}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{PRS_COUNTRY}, ''), 'KR'), '4', 'ST', 'Y', #{PRS_ID}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.select:
SELECT PRS_ID, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_USE_YN, PRS_CREATE_DATE AS CON_CREATE_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID) AS AD_VIEW_CNT, IFNULL(IS_POPULAR, 'N') AS IS_POPULAR,
-- [신규] 즐겨찾기(팔로워) 수 추가 IFNULL(FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) AS FOLLOWER_CNT
FROM WH_PRESS A WHERE PRS_TYPE = '4' AND PRS_AUTH = 'ST'
AND PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
ORDER BY IS_POPULAR DESC, PRS_CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_COUNTRY = #{country} AND IS_POPULAR = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.CON_ID, A.CON_BODY, A.CREATED_DATE, A.IS_PINNED, B.PRS_NAME, B.STORED_FILE_NM as MEM_PICTURE,
-- (기존 하트 서브쿼리들...) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_LIKE WHERE CON_ID = A.CON_ID) AS HEART_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_LIKE WHERE CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND MEM_ID = #{memId}) AS IS_LIKED,
D.THUMB_URL as image, D.MEDIA_URL, D.MEDIA_TYPE FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT A JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID JOIN STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA D ON A.CON_ID = D.CON_ID WHERE A.PRS_ID = #{starId} AND D.SORT_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY A.IS_PINNED DESC, A.CREATED_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_STAR_CONTENT SET IS_PINNED = #{targetStatus}, PIN_LINK_TEXT1 = #{pinLinkText1}, PIN_LINK_URL1 = #{pinLinkUrl1}, PIN_LINK_TEXT2 = #{pinLinkText2}, PIN_LINK_URL2 = #{pinLinkUrl2} WHERE CON_ID = #{conId}
mapper.select:
SELECT B.PRS_ID, B.PRS_NAME, B.PRS_COUNTRY,
-- 전체 노출 수 COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT,
-- OS별 노출 수 SUM(CASE WHEN A.OS = 'ANDROID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ANDROID_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OS = 'IOS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IOS_CNT
FROM WH_AD_LOG A JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID WHERE A.ACTION = 'IMPRESSION'
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{targetMonth}
AND B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
GROUP BY B.PRS_ID, B.PRS_NAME, B.PRS_COUNTRY ORDER BY TOTAL_CNT DESC
SELECT PRS_ID, POPULAR_ORDER, LIST_ORDER FROM WH_PRESS WHERE (POPULAR_ORDER > 0 OR LIST_ORDER > 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET POPULAR_ORDER = CASE WHEN POPULAR_ORDER BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN 0 ELSE POPULAR_ORDER END, LIST_ORDER = CASE WHEN LIST_ORDER BETWEEN 9 AND 16 THEN 0 ELSE LIST_ORDER END
UPDATE WH_PRESS SET LIST_ORDER = 0 WHERE PRS_COUNTRY = #{country} AND LIST_ORDER BETWEEN 25 AND 32
UPDATE WH_PRESS SET POPULAR_ORDER = #{POPULAR_ORDER} WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
UPDATE WH_PRESS SET LIST_ORDER = #{LIST_ORDER} WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, category, description, sns_link, collab_price, partner_price, email, status, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at FROM ipo_requests WHERE status != 'hidden' ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, -- 대기중인 걸 가장 위로 created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_GUEST_BLACKLIST WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}

SELECT R.REPORT_ID, R.TARGET_TYPE, R.TARGET_ID, R.REPORTER_DEVICE_ID, R.REASON, DATE_FORMAT(R.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS REPORT_DATE, C.CONTENT AS REPORTED_CONTENT, C.NICKNAME AS REPORTED_NICKNAME, C.DEVICE_ID AS REPORTED_DEVICE_ID, C.STATUS AS COMMENT_STATUS FROM WH_GUEST_REPORT R LEFT JOIN WH_GUEST_COMMENT C ON R.TARGET_ID = C.CMT_ID AND R.TARGET_TYPE = 'COMMENT' WHERE C.STATUS = 'NORMAL' -- 🌟 조건 1: 아직 살아있는(NORMAL) 댓글만 보여줌 AND NOT EXISTS ( -- 🌟 조건 2: 이미 영구 차단(글로벌 블락)된 기기의 신고는 안 보여줌 SELECT 1 FROM WH_GUEST_BLOCK B WHERE B.DEVICE_ID = C.DEVICE_ID ) ORDER BY R.CREATED_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_ADMIN_CONTENT (ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_LEVEL, ADMIN_COUNTRY, CON_BODY, IMAGE_URL, CREATED_DATE) VALUES (#{ADMIN_ID}, #{ADMIN_LEVEL}, #{ADMIN_COUNTRY}, #{CON_BODY}, #{IMAGE_URL}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSAGES WHERE SENDER_TYPE = 'USER' AND IS_READ = 0

SELECT M.PAGE_ID, P.PRS_NAME, MAX(M.CREATED_AT) as LAST_MSG_TIME, (SELECT MESSAGE FROM MESSAGES WHERE PAGE_ID = M.PAGE_ID ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1) as LAST_MSG, SUM(CASE WHEN M.SENDER_TYPE = 'USER' AND M.IS_READ = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UNREAD_COUNT FROM MESSAGES M JOIN WH_PRESS P ON M.PAGE_ID = P.PRS_ID GROUP BY M.PAGE_ID, P.PRS_NAME ORDER BY LAST_MSG_TIME DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE DATE(PRS_CREATE_DATE) = CURDATE()
AND PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
